name: pr_qx_bare_snapshot
drl:
query BVals(long $v)
    B(k == $v)
end

rule R1
when
    ?BVals($x;)
then
    insert(new Out($x));
end
_finding: The bare ?query rule across a FIRE BOUNDARY (external review round 20, the D-057 lifecycle corner): a rule whose only CE is a pull query fires for rows present at its first evaluation, and a matching fact inserted EXTERNALLY AFTER that fire is invisible - the pull CE is non-reactive and nothing else in the rule re-triggers evaluation. One Out(1) for the whole run; the late B(2) never surfaces. The standing late-family (pr_qx2_late_pull, pr_qx9_*late*) pins only SAME-BATCH rule-inserted lateness; this is the cross-fire cell.
